fields.description:
## Why
Two coaching situations rebar cannot currently express well. DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT was REJECTED as a move (counter-architectural).

## What (concrete targets + templates)
- Canonical registry = MOVE_REGISTRY in src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/coach.py. CORRECTION: it is ALSO mirrored verbatim in docs/plan-review-gate.md (lines ~148-160) -- both must change in lockstep.
- Add foundation/enhancement split move with a LOCKED template (LLM fills only {subject}): e.g. "Ship a working baseline of {subject} now; make the enhanced version a dependent follow-on." Distinct from move 7 (which decomposes by SCOPE end-to-end); this decomposes by FIDELITY. Decide whether it carries an applies_when scoping field (the schema field that controls which moves are offered).
- Sharpen move 9's template (currently "Plan how {subject} will be verified before implementing it.") to also cover restating an unobservable/deferred success target as an in-session-observable one. Decide sharpen-in-place vs new applies_when-scoped move and record rationale; note back-out = revert template.
- Clarify F1 phrasing: F1 as a whole is the blocking criterion (block_threshold 0.7) and in_session_evaluable is its checklist item -- avoid implying the sub-item independently carries a BLOCKING flag.
- DO NOT add DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT: post-hoc validation -> a discovered_from follow-up ticket, keeping the current ticket in-session-closable.

## Provenance
Labels like G-8 / FP-3a / R-6 / WS-N are provenance tags from the DSO gap-report evaluation (~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md) + session log brief-bride-rash (95f1-1b3b-a867-4020) -- they are NOT codebase symbols and cannot be grepped. Concrete code targets are named inline and in this ticket's file_impact.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] foundation/enhancement move added to coach.py MOVE_REGISTRY with its verbatim locked template; applies_when decision recorded. Proof: `pytest -k move_registry` green.
- [ ] move 9 template updated for verifiable-proxy; rationale + back-out noted. Proof: grep the new wording in coach.py.
- [ ] docs/plan-review-gate.md move table updated identically. Proof: the doc table matches MOVE_REGISTRY (diff-check).
- [ ] Coaching for post-hoc validation routes to a discovered_from follow-up ticket, never to deferring the current AC.
